name: Alex Chen
title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
bio: Alex has tested over 50 VPN services across 5 years at TrueTopReviews. He holds CISSP and CEH certifications and specializes in network security and privacy technologies.

name: Sarah Mitchell
title: Senior Tech Reviewer
bio: Sarah has been evaluating VPN services and cybersecurity products for 7 years. She specializes in streaming performance testing and privacy policy analysis.
